subcodes.first_line: Magnified be Thy Name, O my God!  I love to call on Thee with every tongue, to implore Thee with every utterance, to remember Thee with every heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی احب بکل لسان ادعوک و بکل بیان ارجوک و بکل قلب اذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
